'''Plasto-Cast''' was a medical product created by [[SyntheCure]]. It was a quick drying gel that helped immobilize broken [[Limb/Legends|limbs]]. The [[plasti-coating]] was usually applied by a spray-on canister. After the gel was sprayed onto the affected area it could be molded into a workable cast.

{{Tech-stub}}
